[Wed 2026-03-04 06:50 GMT+8] A cron job "发送象棋大师设计案" just completed successfully.

Findings:
象棋大师设计案已读取完成，正在发送给用户。

---

**📋 象棋大师 - 完整设计案与量化规划**

**项目代号**: Xiangqi Master  
**版本**: v1.0  
**目标平台**: Web (HTML5) + 微信小程序  
**预计开发周期**: 6周  

---

## 一、产品概述

### 1.1 产品定位
一款面向零基础用户的中国象棋教学App，借鉴多邻国(Duolingo)的游戏化学习模式，通过碎片化、关卡化、社交化的设计，让用户在轻松有趣的氛围中掌握中国象棋。

### 1.2 核心用户画像
- **象棋小白**: 完全不会，想入门 — 需要简单易懂、循序渐进
- **家长用户**: 想教孩子下棋 — 需要适合儿童、有成就感
- **业余爱好者**: 会一点，想系统学 — 需要查漏补缺、提升棋力
- **老年用户**: 休闲娱乐 — 需要大字模式、简单操作

### 1.3 竞品差异化
| 产品 | 我们的差异化 |
|-----|-------------|
| 多邻国国际象棋 | 本土化中国象棋内容 |
| 象棋巫师 | 现代化UI，循序渐进 |
| 天天象棋 | 专注教学，降低门槛 |

---

## 二、核心系统设计

### 2.1 游戏化机制（借鉴多邻国）

**技能树结构**（12章，150关）：
```
├── 第一章：初识棋盘 (10关)
├── 第二章：走子基础 (10关)
├── 第三章：将帅安全 (10关)
├── 第四章：基本战术 (15关)
├── 第五章：基本杀法 (15关)
├── 第六章：开局基础 (15关)
├── 第七章：中局技巧 (15关)
├── 第八章：残局基础 (15关)
├── 第九章：经典残局 (10关)
├── 第十章：名局赏析 (5关)
├── 第十一章：实战对弈 (10关)
└── 第十二章：巅峰挑战 (20关)
```

### 2.2 激励机制
| 机制 | 说明 |
|-----|------|
| 连胜(Streak) | 连续答对关卡数，答错归零 |
| 棋艺值(XP) | 每关10-50 XP |
| 宝石 | 答对+10，提示-5 |
| 生命值 | 5点，答错-1 |
| 段位 | 12个段位，从入门到特级大师 |

---

## 三、详细关卡设计

### 第一章：初识棋盘 (10关)
**目标**：认识棋盘和棋子

| 关卡 | 标题 | 内容 | 预计时长 |
|-----|------|------|---------|
| 1-1 | 认识九宫 | 九宫位置和作用 | 2分钟 |
| 1-2 | 认识楚河汉界 | 分界线的作用 | 2分钟 |
| 1-3~1-9 | 认识各棋子 | 将帅士象马车炮兵卒 | 各3分钟 |
| 1-10 | 综合测试 | 识别所有棋子 | 5分钟 |

**章节总时长**：约30分钟

### 第二章：走子基础 (10关)
**目标**：掌握各棋子基本走法
- 拖拽题：将帅、士、象、马、车、炮、兵的移动
- 实战题：吃子练习

### 第三章：将帅安全 (10关)
**目标**：理解将军和应将
- 将帅不能照面
- 将军的概念与识别
- 三种应将方法（移动、吃掉、垫将）
- 双将危机、绝杀与困毙

---

## 四、功能模块规划

### 4.1 核心功能模块

| 模块 | 功能 | 优先级 | 预估工时 |
|-----|------|--------|---------|
| 学习 | 关卡系统（150关） | P0 | 40h |
| 学习 | 棋盘引擎 | P0 | 30h |
| 学习 | AI导师（棋仙爷爷） | P1 | 20h |
| 游戏化 | 连胜+段位+成就 | P0 | 45h |
| 对战 | AI对弈（5级难度） | P1 | 40h |
| 对战 | 残局挑战（100+局） | P2 | 30h |
| 社交 | 好友+分享 | P3 | 30h |

---

## 五、技术架构

### 5.1 技术选型
| 层级 | 技术 |
|-----|------|
| 前端 | HTML5 + Canvas |
| 状态管理 | LocalStorage |
| AI引擎 | JavaScript (minimax算法) |
| 后端(可选) | Node.js + MongoDB |

### 5.2 AI算法核心
采用minimax算法 + 评估函数，支持5级难度（从新手到大师）

---

## 六、UI/UX设计规范

### 色彩系统
| 用途 | 颜色 | 色值 |
|-----|------|------|
| 主色调 | 中国红 | #C41E3A |
| 辅助色 | 金色 | #D4AF37 |
| 背景色 | 深灰蓝 | #1A1A2E |
| 文字色 | 米白 | #F5F5F5 |
| 成功色 | 翠绿 | #00C851 |
| 错误色 | 朱红 | #FF4444 |

---

## 七、开发计划（6周）

| 周次 | 重点 | 交付物 |
|-----|------|--------|
| 第1周 | 基础框架 | 可交互棋盘 |
| 第2周 | 核心学习系统 | 第一章可玩（MVP） |
| 第3周 | 游戏化系统 | 完整激励机制 |
| 第4周 | AI与对战 | 可对弈 |
| 第5周 | 内容填充 | 120关完成 |
| 第6周 | 优化上线 | v1.0发布 |

---

## 八、量化指标

### 内容量化
- 总关卡数：150关（12章）
- 题目总数：500+题
- 残局数量：100+局
- AI难度等级：5级
- 成就数量：30+个

### 技术指标
- 首屏加载时间：<3秒
- 关卡切换时间：<500ms
- AI响应时间：<2秒
- 支持设备：iOS 12+, Android 8+（95%+）
- 离线可用：100%核心功能

### 用户指标（上线后3个月目标）
- 日活跃用户(DAU)：1000+
- 次日留存率：40%+
- 7日留存率：20%+
- 平均学习时长：15分钟/日
- 关卡完成率：60%+
- 付费转化率：3%+

---

## 九、里程碑

| 时间 | 里程碑 | 交付物 |
|-----|--------|--------|
| 第1周末 | 基础框架完成 | 可交互棋盘 |
| 第2周末 | MVP完成 | 第一章可玩 |
| 第3周末 | 游戏化系统完成 | 完整激励机制 |
| 第4周末 | AI系统完成 | 可对弈 |
| 第5周末 | 内容填充80% | 120关完成 |
| 第6周末 | 正式上线 | v1.0发布 |

---

## 十、后续规划

- **v1.1**（上线后1个月）: PvP对战、好友系统、每日挑战
- **v1.2**（上线后3个月）: 语音讲解、视频教学、棋谱社区
- **长期规划**: AI视频通话教学、实体棋盘联动、国际化推广

---

**文档版本**: v1.0  
**创建时间**: 2026-03-03

v6_full_game.html 的逻辑完全正确 有几个优化需要完成 1、音乐、音效的功能又丢失了，需要制作出来 2、目前的单局，全部都是有绿色虚线圈的引导的，在第4关开始尝试不给虚线绿圈的提示 【关于提示】 1)精确提示：虚线绿圈的提示——最直观的提示 2)文字提示：明确的提示词——例如：吃掉最近的棋子 3)模糊提示：模糊的提示词——例如：找到最佳的下法，后面就看你的了…… 可以尝试逐步放开更精确的提示 3、优化单局成功后的提示界面 参考下图的样式，让提示界面更融入游戏，不使用上层弹窗的模式，而是直接在棋盘的下半部分直接弹出成功提示按钮

收到，三个优化点：

1. **音乐音效** - 恢复功能
2. **提示分级** - 第4关起逐步减少虚线绿圈，改用文字/模糊提示
3. **成功界面** - 棋盘下半部分嵌入式提示，替代弹窗

明白了，多邻国风格的成功界面：

- 底部绿色横幅嵌入棋盘区域
- 左侧 ✓ + 鼓励文字（"泰裤辣！"）
- 右侧 重玩/分享 图标

content.text: 找到了，在 `xiangqi_master/demo/v6_full_game.html`。我这就读取并修改。

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>象棋大师 - 完整四层结构</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }
        
        body {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif;
            background: #F5F5F5;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }
        
        .screen {
            display: none;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }
        
        .screen.active {
            display: block;
        }
        
        /* ===== 第一层：章 ===== */
        .chapter-header {
            background: white;
            padding: 20px 16px;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }
        
        .chapter-header-title {
            font-size: 22px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
        }
        
        .chapter-header-subtitle {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #666;
            margin-top: 6px;
        }
        
        .chapter-list {
            padding: 16px;
        }
        
        .chapter-card {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        
        .chapter-card:active {
            transform: scale(0.98);
        }
        
        .chapter-card.locked {
            opacity: 0.6;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-name {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-status {
            font-size: 12px;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-status.completed { background: #E8F5E9; color: #4CAF50; }
        .chapter-card-status.current { background: #E3F2FD; color: #2196F3; }
        .chapter-card-status.locked { background: #F5F5F5; color: #999; }
        
        .chapter-card-progress {
            height: 8px;
            background: #E0E0E0;
            border-radius: 4px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4CAF50, #8BC34A);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-info {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #888;
        }
        
        /* ===== 第二层：主题 ===== */
        .nav-bar {
            background: white;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }
        
        .nav-back {
            font-size: 20px;
            color: #666;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .nav-title {
            font-size: 17px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
        }
        
        .topic-grid {
            padding: 16px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 12px;
        }
        
        .topic-item {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 16px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            position: relative;
        }
        
        .topic-item:active {
            transform: scale(0.96);
        }
        
        .topic-item.locked {
            opacity: 0.5;
        }
        
        .topic-item-number {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }
        
        .topic-item-name {
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            line-height: 1.3;
        }
        
        .topic-item-progress {
            height: 6px;
            background: #E0E0E0;
            border-radius: 3px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .topic-item-progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4CAF50, #8BC34A);
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        
        .topic-item-status {
            position: absolute;
            top: 12px;
            right: 12px;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        
        /* ===== 第三层：关 ===== */
        .level-path-container {
            padding: 20px;
            min-height: calc(100vh - 60px);
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #F5F5F5 0%, #E8EAF6 100%);
        }
        
        .level-path-title {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }
        
        .level-path-subtitle {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 24px;
        }
        
        .level-nodes {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
        }
        
        .level-node-wrapper {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
        }
        
        .level-connector {
            width: 4px;
            height: 20px;
            background: #E0E0E0;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
        
        .level-connector.completed {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4CAF50, #8BC34A);
        }
        
        .level-node {
            width: 68px;
            height: 68px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        
        .level-node.completed {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4CAF50, #8BC34A);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.3);
        }
        
        .level-node.current {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2196F3, #42A5F5);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.35);
            animation: nodePulse 1.5s infinite;
        }
        
        .level-node.locked {
            background: #E0E0E0;
            opacity: 0.6;
        }
        
        .level-node.chest {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD700, #FFA000);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(255, 193, 7, 0.4);
        }
        
        @keyframes nodePulse {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.08); }
        }
        
        .level-node-icon {
            font-size: 26px;
        }
        
        .level-node-label {
            font-size: 10px;
            color: white;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-top: 2px;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 0 4px;
            line-height: 1.2;
        }
        
        /* ===== 第四层：局（游戏界面） ===== */
        .game-screen {
            background: white;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding-bottom: 80px;
        }
        
        .game-top-bar {
            background: white;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }
        
        .game-breadcrumb {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .game-streak {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #FF6B35;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-area {
            padding: 16px;
            background: white;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-label {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-number {
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-track {
            height: 10px;
            background: #E0E0E0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4CAF50, #8BC34A);
            border-radius: 5px;
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }
        
        .game-info-card {
            padding: 20px;
            text-align: center;
            background: white;
        }
        
        .game-tag {
            display: inline-block;
            background: #E3F2FD;
            color: #2196F3;
            padding: 6px 14px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        
        .game-level-name {
            font-size: 22px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        
        .game-level-desc {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .max-box {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E3F2FD, #BBDEFB);
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 14px;
            margin: 12px 16px;
        }
        
        .max-face {
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 3px solid #2196F3;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        
        .max-eyes {
            display: flex;
            gap: 3px;
        }
        
        .max-eye {
            width: 4px;
            height: 8px;
            background: #333;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        
        .max-bubble {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 10px 14px;
            position: relative;
            flex: 1;
        }
        
        .max-bubble::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: -8px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            border: 8px solid transparent;
            border-right-color: white;
        }
        
        .max-message {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #333;
            line-height: 1.4;
        }
        
        .chess-board-wrapper {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #D4A574, #C49A6C);
            padding: 10px;
            margin: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
        }
        
        .chess-board {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 1/1.125;
            background: #E8C9A0;
        }
        
        .board-frame {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            border: 2px solid #8B6914;
        }
        
        .board-grids {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
        }
        
        .grid-h {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 1px;
            background: #8B6914;
        }
        
        .grid-v {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            width: 1px;
            background: #8B6914;
        }
        
        .palace-area {
            position: absolute;
            left: 37.5%;
            width: 25%;
            height: 22.22%;
            border: 1px solid #8B6914;
        }
        
        .palace-top { top: 0; }
        .palace-bottom { bottom: 0; }
        
        .palace-area::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 49.5%, #8B6914 49.5%, #8B6914 50.5%, transparent 50.5%),
                        linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 49.5%, #8B6914 49.5%, #8B6914 50.5%, transparent 50.5%);
        }
        
        .river {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            top: 44.44%;
            height: 11.11%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        
        .river span {
            font-size: 16px;
            color: #8B6914;
            font-weight: bold;
            letter-spacing: 8px;
        }
        
        .pieces-container {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
        }
        
        .chess-piece {
            position: absolute;
            width: 38px;
            height: 38px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), inset 0 2px 4px rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
            z-index: 10;
        }
        
        .chess-piece.selected {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px #2196F3, 0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
        }
        
        .piece-red {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #D32F2F, #B71C1C);
            color: white;
            border: 2px solid #FFCDD2;
        }
        
        .piece-black {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #424242, #212121);
            color: white;
            border: 2px solid #BDBDBD;
        }
        
        .piece-target {
            background: rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.25);
            border: 2px dashed #4CAF50;
        }
        
        .move-indicator {
            position: absolute;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, #4CAF50, #2E7D32);
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            pointer-events: none;
            animation: indicatorPulse 1.2s infinite;
            z-index: 5;
        }
        
        @keyframes indicatorPulse {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 0.85; }
            50% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.3); opacity: 0.4; }
        }
        
        .game-actions {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            background: white;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            box-shadow: 0 -2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            padding-bottom: calc(12px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
        }
        
        .game-btn {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 12px 20px;
            border-radius: 24px;
            border: none;
            font-size: 14px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .btn-gray {
            background: #F5F5F5;
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .btn-blue {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2196F3, #1976D2);
            color: white;
        }
        
        .modal-overlay {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 100;
        }
        
        .modal-overlay.show {
            display: flex;
        }
        
        .modal-box {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 24px;
            padding: 28px 24px;
            text-align: center;
            max-width: 300px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        
        .modal-emoji {
            font-size: 56px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        
        .modal-heading {
            font-size: 22px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        
        .modal-desc {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        
        .modal-btn {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4CAF50, #388E3C);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            padding: 14px 32px;
            border-radius: 24px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 700;
            cursor: pointer;
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .chest-popup .modal-box {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD700, #FFA000);
        }
        
        .reward-box {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 16px;
            margin: 16px 0;
        }
        
        .reward-line {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
        }
        
        .shake {
            animation: shakeAnim 0.4s ease;
        }
        
        @keyframes shakeAnim {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
            25% { transform: translateX(-6px); }
            75% { transform: translateX(6px); }
        }
        
        /* 关卡结算界面 */
        .level-complete-screen {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: white;
            z-index: 200;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 40px 24px;
        }
        
        .level-complete-screen.show {
            display: flex;
        }
        
        .complete-mascot {
            width: 180px;
            height: 180px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            animation: mascotBounce 1s ease infinite alternate;
        }
        
        @keyframes mascotBounce {
            0% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(-3deg); }
            100% { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(3deg); }
        }
        
        .complete-mascot svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }
        
        .complete-title {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #FFC107;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        
        .complete-subtitle {
            font-size: 16px;
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 32px;
        }
        
        .stats-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 360px;
            margin-bottom: 32px;
        }
        
        .stat-card {
            flex: 1;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 16px 8px;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            border: 2px solid transparent;
        }
        
        .stat-card.xp { border-color: #FFC107; }
        .stat-card.accuracy { border-color: #4CAF50; }
        .stat-card.speed { border-color: #2196F3; }
        
        .stat-card-header {
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .stat-card-icon {
            font-size: 28px;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }
        
        .stat-card-value {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 800;
            margin-bottom: 2px;
        }
        
        .stat-card.xp .stat-card-value { color: #FFC107; }
        .stat-card.accuracy .stat-card-value { color: #4CAF50; }
        .stat-card.speed .stat-card-value { color: #2196F3; }
        
        .stat-card-label {
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #999;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .complete-btn {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 360px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2196F3, #1976D2);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            font-size: 17px;
            font-weight: 700;
            cursor: pointer;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.3);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- 第一层：章 -->
    <div class="screen active" id="chapterScreen">

            const container = document.getElementById('chapterList');
            container.innerHTML = '';
            
            gameData.chapters.forEach((chapter, index) => {
                const card = document.createElement('div');
                card.className = `chapter-card ${chapter.locked ? 'locked' : ''}`;
                
                const statusClass = chapter.locked ? 'locked' : (index === 0 ? 'current' : 'completed');
                const statusText = chapter.locked ? '🔒 锁定' : (index === 0 ? '▶ 进行中' : '✓ 已完成');
                
                card.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="chapter-card-header">
                        <span class="chapter-card-name">${chapter.name}</span>
                        <span class="chapter-card-status ${statusClass}">${statusText}</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="chapter-card-progress">
                        <div class="chapter-card-progress-fill" style="width: ${chapter.progress}%"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="chapter-card-info">${chapter.subtitle} · ${chapter.themeCount}个主题</div>
                `;
                
                if (!chapter.locked) {
                    card.onclick = () => enterChapter(chapter);
                }
                
                container.appendChild(card);
            });
        }
        
        function enterChapter(chapter) {
            currentChapter = chapter;
            document.getElementById('chapterScreen').classList.remove('active');
            document.getElementById('topicScreen').classList.add('active');
            document.getElementById('topicNavTitle').textContent = chapter.name.split('：')[0];
            renderTopics();
        }
        
        function backToChapters() {
            document.getElementById('topicScreen').classList.remove('active');
            document.getElementById('chapterScreen').classList.add('active');
        }
        
        // ===== 第二层：主题 =====
        function renderTopics() {
            const container = document.getElementById('topicGrid');
            container.innerHTML = '';
            
            currentChapter.themes.forEach((topic, index) => {
                const item = document.createElement('div');
                item.className = `topic-item ${topic.locked ? 'locked' : ''}`;
                
                const statusIcon = topic.locked ? '🔒' : (topic.progress > 0 ? '✓' : '▶');
                
                item.innerHTML = `
                    <div class="topic-item-status">${statusIcon}</div>
                    <div class="topic-item-number">主题 ${index + 1}</div>
                    <div class="topic-item-name">${topic.name}</div>
                    <div class="topic-item-progress">
                        <div class="topic-item-progress-fill" style="width: ${topic.progress}%"></div>
                    </div>
                `;
                
                if (!topic.locked) {
                    item.onclick = () => enterTopic(topic);
                }
                
                container.appendChild(item);
            });
        }
        
        function enterTopic(topic) {
            currentTopic = topic;
            document.getElementById('topicScreen').classList.remove('active');
            document.getElementById('levelScreen').classList.add('active');
            document.getElementById('levelNavTitle').textContent = topic.name;
            document.getElementById('levelPathTitle').textContent = `${currentChapter.name.split('：')[0]} · ${topic.name}`;
            renderLevels();
        }
        
        function backToTopics() {
            document.getElementById('levelScreen').classList.remove('active');
            document.getElementById('topicScreen').classList.add('active');
        }
        
        // ===== 第三层：关 =====
        function renderLevels() {
            const container = document.getElementById('levelNodes');
            container.innerHTML = '';
            
            theme1Levels.forEach((level, index) => {
                const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
                wrapper.className = 'level-node-wrapper';
                
                if (index > 0) {
                    const line = document.createElement('div');
                    line.className = 'level-connector';
                    wrapper.appendChild(line);
                }
                
                const node = document.createElement('div');
                node.className = 'level-node';
                
                if (level.type === 'chest') {
                    node.classList.add('chest');
                } else if (index === 3) { // 第4关移动马默认解锁
                    node.classList.add('current');
                } else if (index < 3) {
                    node.classList.add('completed');
                } else {
                    node.classList.add('locked');
                }
                
                node.innerHTML = `
                    <span class="level-node-icon">${level.icon}</span>
                    ${level.type !== 'chest' ? `<span class="level-node-label">${level.name}</span>` : ''}
                `;
                
                node.onclick = () => enterLevel(level);
                wrapper.appendChild(node);
                container.appendChild(wrapper);
            });
        }
        
        function enterLevel(level) {
            if (level.type === 'chest') {
                document.getElementById('chestModal').classList.add('show');
                return;
            }
            
            currentLevel = level;
            currentJuIndex = 0;
            currentStepIndex = 0;
            levelStartTime = Date.now();
            completedTargets = [];
            
            document.getElementById('levelScreen').classList.remove('active');
            document.getElementById('gameScreen').classList.add('active');
            
            document.getElementById('gameBreadcrumb').textContent = 
                `${currentChapter.name.split('：')[0]} · ${currentTopic.name} · ${level.name}`;
            document.getElementById('totalJuNum').textContent = level.juCount;
            
            renderJu();
        }
        
        // ===== 第四层：局 =====
        function renderJu() {
            const ju = maLevelJus[currentJuIndex];
            
            document.getElementById('currentJuNum').textContent = currentJuIndex + 1;
            document.getElementById('juProgressBar').style.width = ((currentJuIndex + 1) / currentLevel.juCount * 100) + '%';
            document.getElementById('juTag').textContent = ju.tag;
            document.getElementById('juName').textContent = ju.name;
            document.getElementById('juDesc').textContent = ju.desc;
            document.getElementById('maxMsg').textContent = ju.maxText;
            
            // 重置状态
            currentStepIndex = 0;
            completedTargets = [];
            currentHorsePos = { ...ju.setup.horse };
            
            renderBoard();
            renderPieces(ju);
        }
        
        function renderBoard() {
            const grids = document.getElementById('boardGrids');
            grids.innerHTML = '';
            
            for (let i = 0; i <= 9; i++) {
                const line = document.createElement('div');
                line.className = 'grid-h';
                line.style.top = (i * 11.11) + '%';
                grids.appendChild(line);
            }
            
            for (let i = 0; i <= 8; i++) {
                const line1 = document.createElement('div');
                line1.className = 'grid-v';
                line1.style.left = (i * 12.5) + '%';
                line1.style.top = '0';
                line1.style.height = '44.44%';
                grids.appendChild(line1);
                
                const line2 = document.createElement('div');
                line2.className = 'grid-v';
                line2.style.left = (i * 12.5) + '%';
                line2.style.top = '55.55%';
                line2.style.height = '44.45%';
                grids.appendChild(line2);
            }
        }
        
        function renderPieces(ju) {
            const container = document.getElementById('piecesContainer');
            container.innerHTML = '';
            
            // 马 - 使用当前位置
            const horse = document.createElement('div');
            horse.className = 'chess-piece piece-red';
            horse.textContent = '馬';
            horse.id = 'horsePiece';
            horse.style.left = (currentHorsePos.x * 12.5) + '%';
            horse.style.top = (currentHorsePos.y * 11.11) + '%';
            horse.onclick = (e) => selectHorse(e);
            container.appendChild(horse);
            
            // 其他棋子
            if (ju.setup.otherPieces) {
                ju.setup.otherPieces.forEach(p => {
                    const piece = document.createElement('div');
                    piece.className = 'chess-piece piece-black';
                    piece.textContent = p.piece;
                    piece.style.left = (p.x * 12.5) + '%';
                    piece.style.top = (p.y * 11.11) + '%';
                    container.appendChild(piece);
                });
            }
            
            // 目标 - 根据当前步骤显示
            let targetsToShow = ju.setup.targets;
            
            // 多步关卡：只显示当前步骤的目标
            if (ju.multiStep && ju.steps) {
                const currentStep = ju.steps[currentStepIndex];
                if (currentStep) {
                    targetsToShow = [currentStep.target];
                }
            }
            
            targetsToShow.forEach(t => {
                const target = document.createElement('div');
                target.className = 'chess-piece piece-target';
                target.style.left = (t.x * 12.5) + '%';
                target.style.top = (t.y * 11.11) + '%';
                target.onclick = () => moveToTarget(t);
                container.appendChild(target);
            });
        }
        
        function selectHorse(e) {
            e.stopPropagation();
            document.querySelectorAll('.chess-piece').forEach(p => p.classList.remove('selected'));
            document.querySelectorAll('.move-indicator').forEach(m => m.remove());
            
            const piece = e.target;
            piece.classList.add('selected');
            selectedPiece = piece;
            
            validMoves = calculateHorseMoves(currentHorsePos.x, currentHorsePos.y);
            showMoveIndicators(validMoves);
        }
        
        function calculateHorseMoves(x, y) {
            const moves = [];
            const ju = maLevelJus[currentJuIndex];
            
            const directions = [
                { dx: 1, dy: 2, blockX: 0, blockY: 1 },
                { dx: 2, dy: 1, blockX: 1, blockY: 0 },
                { dx: 2, dy: -1, blockX: 1, blockY: 0 },
                { dx: 1, dy: -2, blockX: 0, blockY: -1 },
                { dx: -1, dy: -2, blockX: 0, blockY: -1 },
                { dx: -2, dy: -1, blockX: -1, blockY: 0 },
                { dx: -2, dy: 1, blockX: -1, blockY: 0 },
                { dx: -1, dy: 2, blockX: 0, blockY: 1 }
            ];
            
            directions.forEach(dir => {
                const newX = x + dir.dx;
                const newY = y + dir.dy;
                const blockX = x + dir.blockX;
                const blockY = y + dir.blockY;
                
                if (newX < 0 || newX > 8 || newY < 0 || newY > 9) return;

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>象棋大师 - 完整四层结构</title>
    <style>
        * {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent;
        }
        
        body {
            font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', sans-serif;
            background: #F5F5F5;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }
        
        .screen {
            display: none;
            min-height: 100vh;
        }
        
        .screen.active {
            display: block;
        }
        
        /* ===== 第一层：章 ===== */
        .chapter-header {
            background: white;
            padding: 20px 16px;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }
        
        .chapter-header-title {
            font-size: 22px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
        }
        
        .chapter-header-subtitle {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #666;
            margin-top: 6px;
        }
        
        .chapter-list {
            padding: 16px;
        }
        
        .chapter-card {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 16px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        
        .chapter-card:active {
            transform: scale(0.98);
        }
        
        .chapter-card.locked {
            opacity: 0.6;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-name {
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-status {
            font-size: 12px;
            padding: 4px 10px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-status.completed { background: #E8F5E9; color: #4CAF50; }
        .chapter-card-status.current { background: #E3F2FD; color: #2196F3; }
        .chapter-card-status.locked { background: #F5F5F5; color: #999; }
        
        .chapter-card-progress {
            height: 8px;
            background: #E0E0E0;
            border-radius: 4px;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4CAF50, #8BC34A);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }
        
        .chapter-card-info {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #888;
        }
        
        /* ===== 第二层：主题 ===== */
        .nav-bar {
            background: white;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }
        
        .nav-back {
            font-size: 20px;
            color: #666;
            cursor: pointer;
        }
        
        .nav-title {
            font-size: 17px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
        }
        
        .topic-grid {
            padding: 16px;
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
            gap: 12px;
        }
        
        .topic-item {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 16px;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            position: relative;
        }
        
        .topic-item:active {
            transform: scale(0.96);
        }
        
        .topic-item.locked {
            opacity: 0.5;
        }
        
        .topic-item-number {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }
        
        .topic-item-name {
            font-size: 15px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 10px;
            line-height: 1.3;
        }
        
        .topic-item-progress {
            height: 6px;
            background: #E0E0E0;
            border-radius: 3px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .topic-item-progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4CAF50, #8BC34A);
            border-radius: 3px;
        }
        
        .topic-item-status {
            position: absolute;
            top: 12px;
            right: 12px;
            font-size: 16px;
        }
        
        /* ===== 第三层：关 ===== */
        .level-path-container {
            padding: 20px;
            min-height: calc(100vh - 60px);
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #F5F5F5 0%, #E8EAF6 100%);
        }
        
        .level-path-title {
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }
        
        .level-path-subtitle {
            font-size: 13px;
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 24px;
        }
        
        .level-nodes {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
        }
        
        .level-node-wrapper {
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
        }
        
        .level-connector {
            width: 4px;
            height: 20px;
            background: #E0E0E0;
            border-radius: 2px;
        }
        
        .level-connector.completed {
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #4CAF50, #8BC34A);
        }
        
        .level-node {
            width: 68px;
            height: 68px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
        }
        
        .level-node.completed {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4CAF50, #8BC34A);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.3);
        }
        
        .level-node.current {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2196F3, #42A5F5);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.35);
            animation: nodePulse 1.5s infinite;
        }
        
        .level-node.locked {
            background: #E0E0E0;
            opacity: 0.6;
        }
        
        .level-node.chest {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD700, #FFA000);
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(255, 193, 7, 0.4);
        }
        
        @keyframes nodePulse {
            0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); }
            50% { transform: scale(1.08); }
        }
        
        .level-node-icon {
            font-size: 26px;
        }
        
        .level-node-label {
            font-size: 10px;
            color: white;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-top: 2px;
            text-align: center;
            padding: 0 4px;
            line-height: 1.2;
        }
        
        /* ===== 第四层：局（游戏界面） ===== */
        .game-screen {
            background: white;
            min-height: 100vh;
            padding-bottom: 80px;
        }
        
        .game-top-bar {
            background: white;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            align-items: center;
            box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
        }
        
        .game-breadcrumb {
            font-size: 12px;
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .game-streak {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 4px;
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 600;
            color: #FF6B35;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-area {
            padding: 16px;
            background: white;
            border-bottom: 1px solid #eee;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-header {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-label {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-number {
            font-size: 14px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-track {
            height: 10px;
            background: #E0E0E0;
            border-radius: 5px;
            overflow: hidden;
        }
        
        .ju-progress-fill {
            height: 100%;
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #4CAF50, #8BC34A);
            border-radius: 5px;
            transition: width 0.3s;
        }
        
        .game-info-card {
            padding: 20px;
            text-align: center;
            background: white;
        }
        
        .game-tag {
            display: inline-block;
            background: #E3F2FD;
            color: #2196F3;
            padding: 6px 14px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            font-size: 12px;
            font-weight: 600;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        
        .game-level-name {
            font-size: 22px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 6px;
        }
        
        .game-level-desc {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .max-box {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 12px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #E3F2FD, #BBDEFB);
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 14px;
            margin: 12px 16px;
        }
        
        .max-face {
            width: 48px;
            height: 48px;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 50%;
            border: 3px solid #2196F3;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            flex-shrink: 0;
        }
        
        .max-eyes {
            display: flex;
            gap: 3px;
        }
        
        .max-eye {
            width: 4px;
            height: 8px;
            background: #333;
            border-radius: 50%;
        }
        
        .max-bubble {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 12px;
            padding: 10px 14px;
            position: relative;
            flex: 1;
        }
        
        .max-bubble::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            left: -8px;
            top: 50%;
            transform: translateY(-50%);
            border: 8px solid transparent;
            border-right-color: white;
        }
        
        .max-message {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #333;
            line-height: 1.4;
        }
        
        .chess-board-wrapper {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #D4A574, #C49A6C);
            padding: 10px;
            margin: 12px 16px;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.12);
        }
        
        .chess-board {
            position: relative;
            width: 100%;
            aspect-ratio: 1/1.125;
            background: #E8C9A0;
        }
        
        .board-frame {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            border: 2px solid #8B6914;
        }
        
        .board-grids {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
        }
        
        .grid-h {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 1px;
            background: #8B6914;
        }
        
        .grid-v {
            position: absolute;
            top: 0;
            bottom: 0;
            width: 1px;
            background: #8B6914;
        }
        
        .palace-area {
            position: absolute;
            left: 37.5%;
            width: 25%;
            height: 22.22%;
            border: 1px solid #8B6914;
        }
        
        .palace-top { top: 0; }
        .palace-bottom { bottom: 0; }
        
        .palace-area::before {
            content: '';
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
            background: linear-gradient(45deg, transparent 49.5%, #8B6914 49.5%, #8B6914 50.5%, transparent 50.5%),
                        linear-gradient(-45deg, transparent 49.5%, #8B6914 49.5%, #8B6914 50.5%, transparent 50.5%);
        }
        
        .river {
            position: absolute;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            top: 44.44%;
            height: 11.11%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
        }
        
        .river span {
            font-size: 16px;
            color: #8B6914;
            font-weight: bold;
            letter-spacing: 8px;
        }
        
        .pieces-container {
            position: absolute;
            inset: 0;
        }
        
        .chess-piece {
            position: absolute;
            width: 38px;
            height: 38px;
            border-radius: 50%;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: bold;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: all 0.2s;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            box-shadow: 0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), inset 0 2px 4px rgba(255,255,255,0.4);
            z-index: 10;
        }
        
        .chess-piece.selected {
            box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px #2196F3, 0 3px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
        }
        
        .piece-red {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #D32F2F, #B71C1C);
            color: white;
            border: 2px solid #FFCDD2;
        }
        
        .piece-black {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #424242, #212121);
            color: white;
            border: 2px solid #BDBDBD;
        }
        
        .piece-target {
            background: rgba(76, 175, 80, 0.25);
            border: 2px dashed #4CAF50;
        }
        
        .move-indicator {
            position: absolute;
            width: 12px;
            height: 12px;
            background: radial-gradient(circle, #4CAF50, #2E7D32);
            border-radius: 50%;
            transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
            pointer-events: none;
            animation: indicatorPulse 1.2s infinite;
            z-index: 5;
        }
        
        @keyframes indicatorPulse {
            0%, 100% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1); opacity: 0.85; }
            50% { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) scale(1.3); opacity: 0.4; }
        }
        
        .game-actions {
            position: fixed;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            background: white;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            padding: 12px 16px;
            box-shadow: 0 -2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            padding-bottom: calc(12px + env(safe-area-inset-bottom));
        }
        
        .game-btn {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 12px 20px;
            border-radius: 24px;
            border: none;
            font-size: 14px;
            cursor: pointer;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .btn-gray {
            background: #F5F5F5;
            color: #666;
        }
        
        .btn-blue {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2196F3, #1976D2);
            color: white;
        }
        
        .modal-overlay {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            z-index: 100;
        }
        
        .modal-overlay.show {
            display: flex;
        }
        
        .modal-box {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 24px;
            padding: 28px 24px;
            text-align: center;
            max-width: 300px;
            width: 90%;
        }
        
        .modal-emoji {
            font-size: 56px;
            margin-bottom: 12px;
        }
        
        .modal-heading {
            font-size: 22px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        
        .modal-desc {
            font-size: 14px;
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 16px;
        }
        
        .modal-btn {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #4CAF50, #388E3C);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            padding: 14px 32px;
            border-radius: 24px;
            font-size: 16px;
            font-weight: 700;
            cursor: pointer;
            width: 100%;
        }
        
        .chest-popup .modal-box {
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFD700, #FFA000);
        }
        
        .reward-box {
            background: white;
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 16px;
            margin: 16px 0;
        }
        
        .reward-line {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-size: 18px;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #333;
        }
        
        .shake {
            animation: shakeAnim 0.4s ease;
        }
        
        @keyframes shakeAnim {
            0%, 100% { transform: translateX(0); }
            25% { transform: translateX(-6px); }
            75% { transform: translateX(6px); }
        }
        
        /* 关卡结算界面 */
        .level-complete-screen {
            display: none;
            position: fixed;
            inset: 0;
            background: white;
            z-index: 200;
            flex-direction: column;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 40px 24px;
        }
        
        .level-complete-screen.show {
            display: flex;
        }
        
        .complete-mascot {
            width: 180px;
            height: 180px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            animation: mascotBounce 1s ease infinite alternate;
        }
        
        @keyframes mascotBounce {
            0% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(-3deg); }
            100% { transform: translateY(-10px) rotate(3deg); }
        }
        
        .complete-mascot svg {
            width: 100%;
            height: 100%;
        }
        
        .complete-title {
            font-size: 28px;
            font-weight: 800;
            color: #FFC107;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
        }
        
        .complete-subtitle {
            font-size: 16px;
            color: #666;
            margin-bottom: 32px;
        }
        
        .stats-row {
            display: flex;
            gap: 12px;
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 360px;
            margin-bottom: 32px;
        }
        
        .stat-card {
            flex: 1;
            background: white;
            border-radius: 16px;
            padding: 16px 8px;
            text-align: center;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08);
            border: 2px solid transparent;
        }
        
        .stat-card.xp { border-color: #FFC107; }
        .stat-card.accuracy { border-color: #4CAF50; }
        .stat-card.speed { border-color: #2196F3; }
        
        .stat-card-header {
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #999;
            margin-bottom: 8px;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .stat-card-icon {
            font-size: 28px;
            margin-bottom: 4px;
        }
        
        .stat-card-value {
            font-size: 24px;
            font-weight: 800;
            margin-bottom: 2px;
        }
        
        .stat-card.xp .stat-card-value { color: #FFC107; }
        .stat-card.accuracy .stat-card-value { color: #4CAF50; }
        .stat-card.speed .stat-card-value { color: #2196F3; }
        
        .stat-card-label {
            font-size: 11px;
            color: #999;
            font-weight: 600;
        }
        
        .complete-btn {
            width: 100%;
            max-width: 360px;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #2196F3, #1976D2);
            color: white;
            border: none;
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-radius: 16px;
            font-size: 17px;
            font-weight: 700;
            cursor: pointer;
            box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(33, 150, 243, 0.3);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <!-- 第一层：章 -->
    <div class="screen active" id="chapterScreen">
        <div class="chapter-header">
            <div class="chapter-header-title">象棋大师</div>

        <div class="chapter-list" id="chapterList"></div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- 第二层：主题 -->

        <div class="topic-grid" id="topicGrid"></div>

    <!-- 第三层：关 -->

        <div class="level-path-container">

    </div>
    
    <!-- 第四层：局（游戏界面） -->

    <script>
